title: Create 2026-07-21 review remediation execution plan
outOfScope: Implementing any remediation Work Item listed by the plan
Changing release metadata or publishing a release
Deleting historical plans or Work Item evidence

sources.reason: Work Item boundary and verification requirements.
Previous plan and completed-work history to avoid repeating closed items.

sources.path: user-provided review dated 2026-07-21 at base commit 41b5f66
sources.reason: Current review findings, priorities, and requested final four items.

riskAssessment.reason: The change creates an evidence-backed execution plan and does not alter runtime behavior.

executionDecision.reason: The user explicitly authorized creating the serial remediation plan and its documented workflow.

preReviewWarnings: Verify that every review finding is represented, the final four requested items are last, and historical evidence is preserved.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The new plan records the 2026-07-21 review summary at main commit 41b5f66.
The plan lists remediation Work Items in dependency order and ends with the four user-requested items.
The plan requires the complete PR, archive, branch-cleanup, and main-synchronization lifecycle for every Work Item.
The plan records that the user authorized serial execution, PRs, branch cleanup, testing, documentation alignment, release, and plan cleanup.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The 2026-07-21 review found new conflicts between release truth, guard compatibility fields, evidence claims, and fixture/documentation boundaries that require a fresh remediation sequence.
constraints: Run Work Items serially with one branch and PR per item.
intent.rationale: A new plan is needed because the previous plan is historical and the latest review identifies a new convergence phase rather than a continuation of its closed checklist.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
